[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00100000 1
5 00100000 1
6 10110000 3
7 00111010 4

01 10 00100000 1 match 4 5
12 21 00100000 1 match 4 5
23 32 10110000 3 match 6
34 43 00111010 4 match 7
45 54 01101010 4
56 65 01100110 4
67 76 01000110 3
70 07 01000101 3

02 20 00100100 2
13 31 00101000 2
24 42 00110000 2
35 53 10101010 4
46 64 01100010 3
57 75 01001110 4
60 06 01100100 3
71 17 00001000 1

03 30 00100000 1 match 4 5
14 41 00101000 2
25 52 10100100 3
36 63 00100010 2
47 74 01011010 4
50 05 01100100 3
61 16 00100000 1 match 4 5
72 27 00010100 2

04 40 01100000 2
15 51 00101000 2
26 62 00100100 2
37 73 00011010 3
[completion]

1 absent
